title: Redstoneer
description: A Minecraft Plugin that adds cool features related to Redstone!
body:
Redstoneer: Enhancing Redstone with Powerful Features

Redstoneer is a plugin designed to elevate your Redstone experience by introducing a range of exciting features. Inspired from the mod Redstone Tools.

Features:

  • /autodust - Automatically places Redstone dust on top of placed blocks.
  • /clonecolor - Clone the color of a concrete block and receive a corresponding glass block, or vice versa.
  • /airplace - Empowers you to place blocks freely in mid-air without requiring supporting blocks.

Coming Soon:

  • A signal-emitting block that offers a range of signal strengths from 1 to 7, opening up further possibilities
  • A command enabling precise block replication, including data like redstone repeater ticks, ensuring exact duplication.
